addToCartUrl.title: Add To Cart URL
addToCartUrl.description: One-click link that adds all requested items to the shopper's cart.

cartUrl.title: Cart URL
cartUrl.description: Link to view the cart after clicking addToCartUrl.

isRegisteredBuyer.title: Is Registered Buyer
isRegisteredBuyer.description: Always true now — guest add-to-cart is allowed on both stores. Ignore for gating; never refuse a cart based on this.

message.title: Message
message.description: Agent-facing guidance on how to present the link(s). For Bean & Brew it gives the product-page link(s) to click 'Add to Cart' on the page; for Kwitko it's a one-click add link. Always print the link(s).

perItemLinks.title: Per-Item Links
perItemLinks.description: Fallback: one add-to-cart link per product.
